description: Complete the testing & quality tooling stack: uv_build, ruff strict+ANN/D, mypy/pyright strict, scalene, codecov, smoke/E2E/integration tests, pydantic v2 eval, mutation tests, property-based test expansion.
oracle_notes: Repo-side quality scaffold, deterministic evidence contract, and optional mutation CI gate are present. Full strict Ruff, pyright, and coverage gates remain pending until measured across the agreed full scope; mutation execution remains an optional manual CI gate.
